author: priya.k (Process Eng)
text: Seeing a small uptick in USB-C continuity fails on FCT-2 today, all lot B-2026-19. CC1 line specifically, resistance right around the 1.5 ohm limit. Anyone touch the reflow profile recently?

author: marcus.t (NPI)
text: No reflow changes logged this week. But heads up - procurement swapped the J4 connector to rev D a few weeks back (supplier ECN for the adhesive backing). Same supplier issue we saw on ISS-088 last year.

author: priya.k (Process Eng)
text: Good catch, I forgot about ISS-088. Pulling incoming inspection data for the rev D lot now.

author: dan.w (Test Eng)
text: FCT-2 fixture is coming up on 38k insertions on the current pogo block, PM interval is 30k. Scheduling swap for this weekend just in case it's contributing to marginal contact readings.

author: lena.p (Cal Lab)
text: FCT-1 second shift flagged RF fails again - reference CAL-REF-07 due date lapsed 6/30, interlock should've blocked it but someone may have overridden. Escalating.
